affected_pattern: Burst of NULL TotalCharges aligned to the 02:00–03:00 UTC window
root_cause: SIGTRAN link flap on the mediation interconnect — a brief loss of signaling caused the billing mediation layer to drop billing records for which the correlation lookup failed, yielding NULL rated amounts.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: SIGTRAN Interconnect Flap pattern
Interconnect monitoring shows link-down events in the exact window
Correlated ticket from carrier partner about M3UA instability
recommended_action: Replay billing records from the upstream network element buffer
Engage carrier partner to stabilize the SIGTRAN interconnect
Monitor M3UA link state with pager-level alerting
